Galaxies: Parzi's Star Wars Mod non-code asset notice

Upstream repository:
https://github.com/Parzivail-Modding-Team/GalaxiesParzisStarWarsMod

Pinned revision:
b91b4cc1a827eeb7c2ae16f0b703affd78c1c206

The upstream README declares all non-code assets under the Creative Commons
Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International license (CC BY-SA 4.0).

License deed and legal code:
https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/
https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/legalcode

Attribution: Parzivail Modding Team and upstream contributors.
Changes: selected Blockbench groups were converted to GeckoLib bones and explicit
per-face UVs; variants, held-item anchors, player-armor parenting, and deterministic
palette adaptations were added for Galactic Wars.
